title: Does the WooCommerce integration still exist?
excerpt: Hello! I’m attempting to automate the importation of new orders from a woocommerce site into monday.com. There are references in these forums to a WooCommerce integration that was created by the monday.com team. Is that …

posts.author: lyle (Lyle Jantzi III)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! I’m attempting to automate the importation of new orders from a woocommerce site into monday.com. There are references in these forums to a WooCommerce integration that was created by the monday.com team. Is that still available to use? I don’t see it in the integrations center.

posts.author: dkoviessen (Darren Koviessen)
posts.cookedHtml:
It did exist but I just noticed that it’s missing as an option for us as well when I tried to create an integration for a new board. Not sure why they removed it as it’s an amazing feature. We still have it activated for two of our existing boards and would be devistated if they disabled it.

@monday-team what happened?
